configWindow.title: Settings
configWindow.language.label: Language
configWindow.dagMode.description: Determines how nodes are positioned based on their hierarchy.
configWindow.dagLevelDistance.description: Sets the spacing between each hierarchical level in the graph(0 - 100).
configWindow.system.description: Select the Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu systems you want to load into the visualization. Each activated system will add its positions and transitions to the main graph.

touch.title: Use touch gestures to navigate the scene
touch.text2: Swipe with two fingers: Pan view
touch.text3: Pinch with two fingers: Zoom in/out

desk.title: Use the mouse to navigate the scene

landing.title: Your BJJ courses, clear and ready to follow
landing.subtitle: Find what you want to study, jump back in where you left off, and keep moving with a simple focused experience.
landing.helper: Log in to unlock all courses, videos, and your progress.
landing.blockedNotice: You need to log in to access {{path}}.
landing.metricRoutesLabel: Ready to follow step by step
landing.visualBody: Open a course, track your progress, and come back without losing context.
landing.featurePersonalizedDescription: You see first what makes the most sense for you to keep studying.
landing.featureContinuityDescription: Return to your last course and instantly spot what you already watched.
landing.featurePrecisionDescription: A focused experience built around technique, sequence, and detail.
landing.featureRoutesDescription: Explore systems and courses through a structure that is easy to understand.
landing.featureTrackingDescription: Spot watched videos quickly and keep moving without guessing.

notFound.title: This route does not exist
notFound.description: The page you tried to open is not available or the address is not valid. You can go back to the start page and continue from there.

home.title: Hi, {{name}}
home.continueTitle: Pick up where you left off
home.continueSubtitle: Your last course, ready to continue.
home.progressFallback: You have not watched videos here yet.
home.emptyProgressDescription: Explore a course and your progress will appear here.
home.routesSubtitle: Suggested from what you watch most.
home.routeReasonCoach: You are interested in courses by {{topic}}.
home.routeReasonPopular: A strong selection to begin with.
home.systemsSubtitle: Courses you may want to study next.

videoDetail.missingVideoDescription: Open the content from a valid course to keep navigation context.

courseDetail.missingCourseDescription: Return to Explore to open the course from a valid navigation flow.

nodeView.title: Video Player
nodeView.subTitle: View and analyze the video content below.
nodeView.brandSubTitle: Define the start and end points for specific video segments.

nodeConnectionViewer.sourceLinksLabel: This node has no outgoing connections.
nodeConnectionViewer.targetLinksLabel: This node has no incoming connections.
